title: 4-colour screen-print separation pack — white underbase + lavender/cobalt/deep-purple spot plates via masked halftone, dot-gain choke, licensed grunge + VHS alt colourway, vectorized lettering plate, and a real Illustrator-rendered separation/registration sheet driven by a spot-colour CSV
one_line_ask: Split the approved cloud-and-lettering tee artwork (on black) into a print-ready 4-colour screen-print separation pack — a white underbase plate, three masked-halftone spot plates (lavender, cobalt, deep purple) with a dot-gain choke, a licensed-grunge VHS alt colourway, a vectorized lettering plate, and an Illustrator-rendered separation sheet plus per-ink registration/swatch cards merged from the shop's spot-colour CSV.
deliverables: White underbase separation (select-subject -> invert -> fill white)
Three spot-colour halftone plates (lavender / cobalt / deep purple) — B&W Ben-Day dots inside the cloud mask, lettering held out
Dot-gain choke pass (gaussian on the dot field) so shadows don't plug on a black tee
Per-spot colour proofs to target Pantone builds (custom-RGB tint / multiply overlay)
Distressed VHS alt colourway — licensed Stock grunge multiplied in + grain + noise + chromatic-aberration glitch, resized for merch mockup
Illustrator-rendered separation sheet (4 plates + registration marks) to print PDF from a genuine merged .ai
Per-ink registration/swatch card set data-merged from the spot-colour CSV
Composed proof contact sheet for client sign-off (local PIL)
